The charity has lodged papers in London’s high court over defamation claims naming Prince Harry and the former Sentebale trustee Mark Dyer as defendants.
 Continue reading...

articles.title: Four men deported by US to Eswatini have right to see lawyer, court rules
articles.description:
The men, sent to the southern African country in July, have been denied in-person counsel for nine months 
Four men deported by the US to Eswatini and denied in-person legal counsel for nine months while detained in a maximum security prison have the right to see a local lawyer, Eswatini’s supreme court ruled.
The men, from Cambodia, Cuba, Vietnam and Yemen, were sent to the small southern African country, formerly known as Swaziland, in July despite having no connection to the country, as part of Donald Trump’s administration’s efforts to ramp up deportations.
 Continue reading...

articles.title: Wild chimpanzees recorded waging ‘civil war’ with coordinated attacks between two groups
articles.description:
New study describes what may be the first case of a unified community of chimps, in Uganda, turning on itself
On a June day in 2015, primatologist Aaron Sandel was quietly observing a small cluster of the Ngogo chimpanzee group in Uganda’s Kibale national park when he noticed something strange. As other members of the chimpanzees’ wider group moved closer through the forest, the chimpanzees in front of him began to display nervous behaviour. They grimaced and touched each other for reassurance, acting more like they were about to meet strangers than close companions.
In hindsight, Sandel said, that moment was the first sign of what would become a years-long bloody conflict between a once close-knit group of chimps.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 野生のチンパンジーが「内戦」を繰り広げ、2つのグループ間で協調攻撃が記録される

Olivia has been detained for months at the sprawling Dilley center in Texas. She has lost 20lb, and wakes up every day with a headache
Each day in detention feels like 48 hours for Olivia.
The 19-year-old asylum seeker from the Democratic Republic of the Congo has been at the Dilley Immigration processing center in Texas for more than four months.

articles.title: US seeks to deport Kilmar Ábrego García to Liberia despite new Costa Rica deal
articles.description:
Man born in El Salvador has been fighting removal to series of ‘third’ countries after mistaken deportation last year
US government attorneys on Tuesday told a federal judge the Department of Homeland Security still intends to deport Kilmar Ábrego García to Liberia, despite a new agreement with Costa Rica to accept deportees who cannot legally be returned to their home countries.
The Salvadorian national’s case has become a focal point in the immigration debate after he was mistakenly deported to El Salvador last year. Since his return, he has been fighting a second deportation to a series of African countries proposed by homeland security officials.
 Continue reading...

articles.title: Human rights groups decry US plan for Guantánamo camp for Cuban migrants
articles.description:
Exclusive: Dozens of organizations write to Congress after general announced plan to ‘deal with’ those fleeing any humanitarian crisis on the island
Dozens of US and international human rights organizations are decrying the Trump administration’s plans to establish a migrant “camp” for fleeing Cubans at the Guantánamo Bay military base if the island nation’s crisis worsens under pressure from the US, according to a letter to members of Congress on Friday.
The 85 groups plan to submit the joint letter, exclusively shared with the Guardian, to US senators and House representatives, expressing their “profound concern” with comments made last month by a top Department of Defense commander, and describing any prospect of further migrant detention at the base as “deeply troubling and unacceptable”.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 人権団体がキューバ移民のためのグアンタナモ収容所計画を非難

articles.title: Peruvians to go to polls hoping to break cycle of instability
articles.description:
Soaring crime and corruption top voter concerns in highly unpredictable election with 35 candidates for president
Peruvians go to the polls on Sunday hoping to break a cycle of instability that has produced nine presidents in a decade as well as surging violent crime, corruption scandals and overwhelming distrust in institutions and politicians.
About 27 million people who are eligible to vote must choose between a record 35 presidential candidates as well as contenders for the bicameral congress – all from a ballot sheet measuring nearly half a metre, the longest in the country’s history.
 Continue reading...

articles.title: Trump ‘reaping bitter fruit’ of thinking Iran intervention as easy as Venezuela, says former diplomat
articles.description:
John Feeley says US president was ‘flush with victory’ of Maduro capture and could make same mistake in Cuba
Donald Trump is “reaping the bitter fruit” of erroneously thinking that the capture of Venezuela’s president, Nicolás Maduro, offered a blueprint for toppling the Iranian regime, according to one of the US state department’s most respected former Latin America experts.
John Feeley, a Marine helicopter pilot who later served as the US ambassador to Panama, believed Trump had been “flush with the victory from Venezuela” when he made the ill-fated decision to attack Iran in February, leaving a trail of destruction across the Middle East and dealing a hammer blow to the global economy.
 Continue reading...

articles.title: US accused of pressuring Latin America to cut ties with Cuban doctors program
articles.description:
Cuba accuses US of ‘extorting’ countries in pushing them to axe deals with Havana to send doctors on medical missions
Cuba’s foreign minister has accused the United States of “extorting” Latin American countries by putting pressure on them to cancel decades-old deals with Havana for the supply of doctors.
Bruno Rodríguez said the United States was trying to “strangle” the economy of the communist island, which earns billions from its foreign medical missions, after several countries stopped deploying Cuban doctors.
 Continue reading...

articles.title: Argentina approves Milei’s glacier mining bill amid environmental protests
articles.description:
Legislative change backed by libertarian president makes it easier to extract metals in frozen parts of the Andes
Argentina’s congress has approved a bill promoted by the libertarian president, Javier Milei, that authorises mining in ecologically sensitive areas of glaciers and permafrost, outraging environmentalists.
The amendment to the “glacier law”, which was already approved by the senate in February, would make it easier to mine for metals such as copper, lithium and silver in frozen parts of the Andes mountains.
 Continue reading...

articles.title: French far-right leader romantically linked to Italian princess
articles.description: Presidential hopeful Jordan Bardella was pictured on a Corsican beach with Princess Maria Carolina of Bourbon-Two Sicilies.
articles.titleJa: フランスの極右指導者、イタリアの王女と恋愛関係が報じられる
articles.summary: フランスの大統領候補である極右指導者が、イタリアの王女とコルシカ島のビーチで写真に撮られ、恋愛関係が報じられた。

articles.title: Four people die trying to board boat in Channel crossing attempt
articles.description: Authorities say 37 people are being treated in hospital, but around 30 others continued their journeys to the UK.
articles.titleJa: チャンネル海峡横断中にボートに乗ろうとして4人死亡
articles.summary: チャンネル海峡を渡ろうとしてボートに乗ろうとした際に4人が死亡した。37人が病院で治療を受け、約30人は渡航を続けた。

articles.title: Greece to ban social media for under-15s from next year
articles.description: It follows similar moves in other European countries, including France and Spain.
articles.titleJa: ギリシャ、来年から15歳未満のソーシャルメディア利用を禁止へ
articles.summary: ギリシャは来年より15歳未満のソーシャルメディア利用を禁止すると発表。フランスやスペインなど他欧州諸国の同様の動きに続く。

articles.title: Germany suspends military approval for long stays abroad for men under 45
articles.description: The requirement to obtain permission had gone largely unnoticed until a German newspaper reported on it.
articles.titleJa: ドイツ、45歳未満男性の長期海外滞在に対する軍の承認を一時停止
articles.summary: ドイツは45歳未満の男性が長期海外滞在する際の軍の承認要件を一時停止した。これまでほとんど注目されていなかった規則。

articles.title: How the cost of holidays, food and clothes is rising - despite the Iran ceasefire
articles.description: Fuel costs have already soared, flights and mortgages are also rising - and food could soon do the same.
articles.titleJa: イラン停戦にもかかわらず、休暇、食料、衣料品のコストは上昇中
articles.summary: イランの停戦にもかかわらず、燃料費、航空運賃、住宅ローン、食料品など、ホリデーや生活必需品のコストが上昇し続けている。

articles.title: Trapped miner rescued from flooded Mexican tunnel after 14 days
articles.description: The 42-year-old gold miner was standing in waist-high water when rescuers found him in a flooded tunnel.
articles.titleJa: メキシコの浸水したトンネルから14日ぶりに閉じ込められた鉱夫が救出される
articles.summary: メキシコの鉱山で、浸水したトンネルに14日間閉じ込められていた42歳の金鉱夫が無事救助された。救助隊が腰まで水に浸かった彼を発見した。

articles.title: Argentina passes bill loosening protection of its glaciers
articles.description: The new bill will make it easier for provincial governments to allow mining projects in glacier regions.
articles.titleJa: アルゼンチン、氷河保護を緩和する法案を可決
articles.summary: アルゼンチンで、氷河地域での採掘プロジェクトを州政府が許可しやすくする法案が可決された。環境保護団体からは懸念の声が上がっている。

articles.title: Co-founder of Jalisco New Generation drug cartel pleads guilty
articles.description: Érick Valencia Salazar was among a group of 29 alleged drug lords extradited to the US from Mexico.
articles.titleJa: ハリスコ新世代カルテルの共同設立者が有罪を認める
articles.summary: ハリスコ新世代麻薬カルテルの共同設立者であるエリク・バレンシア・サラザールが有罪を認めた。彼はメキシコから米国に引き渡された29人の麻薬組織幹部の一人。

articles.title: Watch: Fire damages roof of Rio's Olympic velodrome
articles.description: Around 80 firefighters and 20 fire trucks tackled the blaze, the state's military fire department said, adding that no one was hurt.
articles.titleJa: リオのオリンピックベロドロームの屋根が火災で損傷
articles.summary: リオデジャネイロのオリンピックベロドロームの屋根が火災で損傷。約80人の消防士と20台の消防車が出動したが、負傷者はいなかった。

articles.title: Husband arrested over disappearance of Michigan woman in Bahamas
articles.description: The lawyer of Brian Hooker, who was identified as the arrested man by US media, says he denies any wrongdoing.
articles.titleJa: バハマでのミシガン州女性失踪事件で夫が逮捕される
articles.summary: バハマでミシガン州女性の失踪事件に関連して夫が逮捕された。弁護士は容疑を否認していると述べている。

articles.title: Chilean woman accused of Pinochet-era kidnaps loses extradition battle
articles.description: Adriana Rivas moved from Chile to Australia in the 1970s, working there as a nanny and cleaner.
articles.titleJa: ピノチェト政権時代の誘拐で告発されたチリ人女性、身柄引き渡し裁判で敗訴
articles.summary: ピノチェト政権時代の誘拐で告発されたチリ人女性アドリアーナ・リバスが、オーストラリアからの身柄引き渡しを巡る裁判で敗訴した。

articles.title: The US refinery now processing Venezuelan oil
articles.description: Chevron is now importing 250,000 barrels of crude per day from Venezuela.
articles.titleJa: ベネズエラ産原油を処理する米国の製油所
articles.summary: シェブロン社がベネズエラから1日あたり25万バレルの原油を輸入し、米国の製油所で処理している。ベネズエラの経済に影響を与える動きだ。

articles.title: Fake Australian, Chinese and Brazilian police stations: BBC goes inside a seized scam compound
articles.description: Almost nothing was known about the Royal Hill casino until the Thai military took control of it in December.
articles.titleJa: 偽の豪州、中国、ブラジルの警察署：BBCが押収された詐欺施設に潜入
articles.summary: タイ軍が支配下に置いたロイヤルヒルカジノは、偽の警察署を装った大規模な国際詐欺拠点として機能していたことが判明した。

articles.title: In one of country's poorest states, Venezuelans hope for post-Maduro boom
articles.description: Ione Wells travels to Sucre, where a lack of investment has hampered locals' prospects.
articles.titleJa: ベネズエラの最も貧しい州の一つで、マドゥロ後を見据えた経済回復への期待
articles.summary: ベネズエラの貧困州スクレでは、投資不足が人々の見通しを阻害してきたが、住民はマドゥロ政権後の経済回復に希望を抱いている。

articles.title: Cuba's mothers-to-be prepare to give birth in a country plunged into darkness
articles.description: Two pregnant women tell the BBC's Will Grant of their hopes and fears as their nation is mired in crisis.
articles.titleJa: 暗闇に包まれた国で出産を控えるキューバの妊婦たち
articles.summary: 危機に陥ったキューバで、停電などの困難を抱えながら出産を控える妊婦たちの希望と不安をBBCが取材。彼女たちの生活に迫る。

articles.title: Community micro-hydropower plants revolutionise isolated areas of the Dominican Republic
articles.description: Community micro-hydropower projects in the DR rely on local leadership to deliver energy from renewable sources to isolated areas excluded from national distribution systems, contributing to reduced greenhouse gas emissions.
articles.titleJa: ドミニカ共和国の孤立地域を改革するコミュニティ小水力発電所
articles.summary: ドミニカ共和国の遠隔地で、地域主導の小水力発電プロジェクトが再生可能エネルギーを供給し、温室効果ガス削減に貢献している。

articles.title: How Bad Bunny brought the issue of Puerto Rico’s power grid into world view
articles.description: Puerto Rico’s electricity system has faced repeated crises since 2017’s Hurricane Maria, which destroyed much of the grid and triggered the longest blackout in modern U.S. history; outages remain routine.
articles.titleJa: バッド・バニーがプエルトリコの電力網問題をいかに世界に知らしめたか
articles.summary: プエルトリコの電力システムは、ハリケーン・マリア以降繰り返し危機に直面しており、停電が日常化している問題が、バッド・バニーによって世界的な注目を集めている。

articles.title: Ecuador’s Netanyahu and Trump supporters target Ecuadorian–Iranian Cultural Center
articles.description: Wars no longer have defined frontlines. Battlefields can be anywhere those in power decide that a neighbor, due to their faith, ethnicity, or background, is an enemy.
articles.titleJa: エクアドルのネタニヤフとトランプの支持者がエクアドル・イラン文化センターを標的とする
articles.summary: エクアドルで、ネタニヤフとトランプの支持者がエクアドル・イラン文化センターを標的としており、現代における政治的・文化的対立の広がりを示唆している。

articles.title: Concerns grow as Jamaica ends Cuban medical programme
articles.description: Terminating the decades-old programme that brought hundreds of Cuban medical personnel to its shores is an unusual move, especially for a programme that had been running smoothly for 50 years.
articles.titleJa: ジャマイカがキューバとの医療プログラムを終了し懸念が高まる
articles.summary: ジャマイカが50年間続いたキューバの医療従事者派遣プログラムを終了し、異例の措置として医療提供への影響が懸念されている。

articles.title: How far-right ‘fear tactics’ affect girls seeking legal abortion in Brazil
articles.description: Fighting a resolution to ensure access to legal abortion for girls under 14 is the latest example of abortion rights being used as a political tool by conservatives in the country
articles.titleJa: ブラジルで極右の「恐怖戦術」がいかに合法的な中絶を求める少女たちに影響を与えるか
articles.summary: ブラジルで極右勢力が14歳未満の少女の合法的な中絶アクセスを妨害する「恐怖戦術」を用いており、保守派による中絶の権利が政治的道具として利用されている。

articles.title: Nawat language now has its own Wikipedia
articles.description: The New Year brought an exciting announcement: the official launch of Wikipedia in Nawat, the result of several years of training and community-building across communities in El Salvador and beyond.
articles.titleJa: ナワット語に独自のウィキペディアが開設
articles.summary: エルサルバドルなどで数年にわたるコミュニティ活動を経て、ナワット語の公式ウィキペディアが新年と共に開設され、言語保存と情報アクセスに貢献する。

articles.title: Beyond words: Incarcerated women’s responses to punitive systems in Peru
articles.description: A collage-based artistic creation workshop revealed how a group of incarcerated women counter the dynamics and effects of imprisonment through individual reflection, creative practice, and the sustaining of collective bonds.
articles.titleJa: 言葉を超えて：ペルーの懲罰制度に対する受刑女性たちの反応
articles.summary: ペルーの受刑女性たちが、コラージュ制作を通じて、個人の内省、創造的実践、集団的絆の維持により、監禁の影響に対抗していることが明らかになった。

articles.title: Action images from Venezuela serve as political messaging and narrative control for Trump
articles.description: For professor Clotilde Perez, spoken to by Pública, contemporary geopolitics has become “media-performative”, where no image is neutral.
articles.titleJa: ベネズエラからの行動画像がトランプの政治的メッセージングと物語統制に利用される
articles.summary: ベネズエラの状況を示す画像が、トランプ大統領の政治的メッセージ発信と物語統制に利用されていることが指摘され、現代の地政学におけるメディアの役割が問われている。

articles.title: Mexican government partially unblocks secure internet
articles.description: The Tor network is used by millions of users daily to securely access the internet, safeguard their right to information and freedom of expression, and avoid censorship or government surveillance.

articles.title: Healing a region: How healthcare is bringing peace to Arauca, Colombia
articles.description: Reliable, inclusive healthcare does more than treat illness. It can function as social glue that softens community strain and transforms clinics into safe spaces for everyone.
articles.titleJa: 地域を癒す：コロンビアのアラウカで医療がいかに平和をもたらしているか
articles.summary: コロンビアのアラウカ地域で、信頼できる包括的な医療が社会的なつながりを強め、地域住民に安全な場所を提供することで平和をもたらしている。

articles.title: The high-stakes diplomacy that led to Pakistan hosting US-Iran peace talks
articles.description: Critical minerals, cryptocurrency, and CIA co-operation - how Asim Munir, Trump’s “favourite field marshal”, may have pulled off the diplomatic coup of the century.
articles.titleJa: パキスタンが米イラン和平交渉を主催した高リスクな外交
articles.summary: パキスタンが米国とイランの和平交渉を主催した背景にある、重要鉱物や暗号通貨、CIA協力を含む高リスクな外交が明らかに。これはアジム・ムニールによる世紀の外交手腕とされる。

articles.title: Taiwan opposition leader meets Xi Jinping in Beijing
articles.description: Cheng Li-wun is the Kuomintang's first sitting leader to visit China in a decade.
articles.titleJa: 台湾野党指導者が北京で習近平氏と会談
articles.summary: 台湾の野党国民党の現職指導者、程麗文氏が10年ぶりに中国を訪問し、習近平国家主席と会談した。これは中台関係において重要な意味を持つ。

articles.title: An inappropriate joke nearly ended his career. Now he's back with more humour
articles.description: A misfired joke nearly derailed Samay Raina’s comedy career. Now he’s back, reclaiming his voice.
articles.titleJa: 不適切なジョークでキャリアが終わりかけた彼。今、よりユーモアを持って帰還
articles.summary: コメディアンのサマイ・ライナは、不適切なジョークでキャリアが危機に瀕したが、困難を乗り越え、再び自身の声を取り戻して舞台に戻ってきた。

articles.title: India proposes new rules to regulate news and political posts on social media
articles.description: The changes will give government more power over news-related posts shared by podcasters and influencers.
articles.titleJa: インド、ソーシャルメディアのニュースおよび政治的投稿を規制する新規則を提案
articles.summary: インド政府は、ソーシャルメディア上のニュース関連投稿や政治的投稿を規制する新たな規則を提案。これにより、政府はポッドキャスターやインフルエンサーが共有する情報に対し、より大きな権限を持つことになる。

articles.title: Hot in the city: Energy crisis tests Singapore's air-con addiction
articles.description: The rise in energy prices has hit Asia particularly hard as many nations are heavily reliant on Gulf oil.
articles.titleJa: 都市の暑さ：エネルギー危機がシンガポールのエアコン依存を試す
articles.summary: エネルギー価格の高騰がシンガポールのエアコン依存に大きな影響を与えている。アジア諸国は湾岸産原油への依存度が高く、エネルギー危機は地域全体を特に厳しく襲っている。

articles.title: BTS battle torrential rain to kick off $1bn world tour
articles.description: The K-Pop band are battered by the elements as they launch their marathon world tour in Goyang.
articles.titleJa: BTS、10億ドル規模のワールドツアーを豪雨の中で開始
articles.summary: K-POPグループBTSが豪雨に見舞われながらも、韓国高陽でマラソンワールドツアーを開始した。悪天候にも関わらず、ファンは熱狂的なスタートを切った彼らを応援した。

articles.title: Key Indian state polls begin in test for Modi's party
articles.description: Modi's Bharatiya Janata Party is trying to expand into regions where it has struggled to gain a foothold.
articles.titleJa: インドの主要州選挙がモディ党にとっての試金石として始まる
articles.summary: インドで主要州の選挙が始まり、モディ首相率いる人民党（BJP）がこれまで支持を得られなかった地域への拡大を目指す試金石となっている。

articles.title: Chinese researcher's death after questioning in US prompts anger in Beijing
articles.description: The semiconductor researcher was found dead after “hostile questioning” by US law enforcement.
articles.titleJa: 米国での尋問後の中国人研究者の死、北京で怒りを招く
articles.summary: 中国人半導体研究者が米国での「敵対的尋問」後に死亡したことで、北京では激しい怒りが巻き起こっている。この事件は米中間の緊張を高める可能性を秘めている。

articles.title: Man fined after breaking into viral hippo Moo Deng's enclosure
articles.description: The director of the Thai zoo where Moo Deng lives said security would be upped after the incident.
articles.titleJa: 人気カバ「ムー・デン」の囲いに侵入した男性に罰金
articles.summary: タイの動物園で人気カバ「ムー・デン」の囲いに侵入した男性が罰金刑に処された。動物園長は事件後、警備を強化すると発表した。

articles.title: British teen dies in reported Vietnam motorbike fall
articles.description: Orla Wates is remembered by her mother as "beautiful, independent and very funny".
articles.titleJa: ベトナムでのバイク転倒で英国人ティーンエイジャーが死亡と報じられる
articles.summary: ベトナムで英国人ティーンエイジャーのオーラ・ウェイツさんがバイク転倒により死亡したと報じられた。彼女の母親は「美しく、自立していて、とても面白かった」と語り、悲しみに暮れている。

articles.title: Members participating in IFD Agreement issue joint ministerial declaration at end of MC14
articles.description: The 129 WTO members participating in the Investment Facilitation for Development Agreement (IFDA) issued a joint ministerial declaration on 29 March at the end of the 14th Ministerial Conference in Yaoundé, Cameroon. A joint press release by the IFDA co-Coordinators — the Republic of Korea and Chile — is provided below.
articles.titleJa: IFD協定参加国がMC14閉幕時に共同閣僚宣言を発表
articles.summary: 129のWTO加盟国が参加する投資円滑化開発協定（IFDA）は、カメルーンのヤウンデで開催された第14回閣僚会議（MC14）閉幕時に共同閣僚宣言を発表した。

articles.title: MC14 concludes with adopted decisions, progress on key outstanding issues
articles.description: The WTO's 14th Ministerial Conference (MC14) concluded early 30 March with ministers adopting a number of decisions as well as making a commitment to continue work in Geneva on key outstanding issues.
articles.titleJa: MC14が採択された決定と主要な未解決問題における進展を伴い閉幕
articles.summary: WTOの第14回閣僚会議（MC14）が3月30日に閉幕し、閣僚たちは複数の決定を採択するとともに、主要な未解決問題に関するジュネーブでの作業継続を約束した。

articles.title: DG cites MPIA as "practical, confidence-building bridge" pending dispute reform deal
articles.description: The Multi-Party Interim Appeal Arbitration Arrangement (MPIA) is serving as a practical, confidence building bridge for WTO members committed to a fully functioning dispute settlement system pending an agreement on dispute settlement reform, Director-General Ngozi Okonjo-Iweala said on 28 March. She made her remarks at a meeting of parties to the MPIA on the sidelines of the WTO's 14th Ministerial Conference (MC14).
articles.titleJa: 事務局長、紛争解決改革合意までMPIAを「実用的で信頼構築の架け橋」と評価
articles.summary: オコンジョ＝イウェアラ事務局長は、紛争解決システムの完全な機能回復に向けた合意が成立するまで、多国間暫定上訴仲裁協定（MPIA）がWTO加盟国にとって実用的で信頼構築の架け橋として機能していると述べた。

articles.title: Ministers exchange views on key WTO topics, consider paths forward at MC14
articles.description: Ministers and senior officials attending the WTO's 14th Ministerial Conference (MC14) participated in a series of meetings on 28 March to address key issues on the WTO agenda and to provide political direction for the post-MC14 work ahead.
articles.titleJa: 閣僚がMC14で主要なWTO議題について意見交換、今後の道筋を検討
articles.summary: WTO第14回閣僚会議（MC14）に出席した閣僚や高官は、3月28日に主要なWTO議題に対処し、MC14後の作業に関する政治的方向性を示すための一連の会議に参加した。

articles.title: Members adopt a pathway to bring E‑Commerce Agreement into force via interim arrangements
articles.description: Sixty-six members, covering approximately 70% of global trade, have adopted a pathway to bring into force the WTO Agreement on Electronic Commerce through interim arrangements while continuing to work towards its incorporation into the WTO legal framework of rules, co-convenors announced on 28 March at the 14th Ministerial Conference taking place in Yaoundé, Cameroon. The joint press release is below.
articles.titleJa: 加盟国が暫定取り決めを通じて電子商取引協定を発効させる道筋を採択
articles.summary: 世界貿易の約70%を占める66の加盟国が、暫定的な取り決めを通じてWTO電子商取引協定を発効させるための道筋を採択したと発表された。

articles.title: Adding value to cotton in Africa can drive inclusive growth, ministers and agency heads say
articles.description: Investment in the cotton, textiles and garments sector can help transform economic development in Central and West Africa, said speakers at a high-level event on the eve of the WTO's 14th Ministerial Conference in Yaoundé, Cameroon, on 25 March and at the opening ceremony on 26 March. Ministers, heads of international agencies, development finance institutions, private sector partners and FIFA representatives highlighted the opportunities for Africa to weave its way up the value chain to accelerate economic growth.
articles.titleJa: アフリカの綿花に付加価値を加えることが包括的成長を促進すると閣僚と機関長が発言
articles.summary: カメルーンのヤウンデで開催されたWTO第14回閣僚会議前夜のイベントで、綿花、繊維、衣料品部門への投資が中央アフリカと西アフリカの経済発展を変革しうると述べられた。

articles.title: Australia contributes an additional AUD 2 million to WTO Fish Fund
articles.description: The government of Australia has committed an additional AUD 2 million (approximately CHF 1.2 million) to the WTO Fisheries Funding Mechanism, known as the Fish Fund, to assist developing and least-developed members in implementing the Agreement on Fisheries Subsidies. This contribution builds on Australia's earlier contribution of AUD 2 million in May 2023.
articles.titleJa: オーストラリア、WTO水産基金に200万AUDを追加拠出
articles.summary: オーストラリア政府は、開発途上国および後発開発途上国が漁業補助金協定を履行できるよう、WTO漁業資金メカニズム（水産基金）にさらに200万AUD（約120万CHF）を拠出した。

articles.title: EU launches safeguard investigation on grain-oriented electrical steel
articles.description: On 27 March 2026, the European Union notified the WTO’s Committee on Safeguards that it had initiated, on the same day (27 March 2026), a safeguard investigation on imports of grain-oriented electrical steel.
articles.titleJa: EUが方向性電磁鋼板に対するセーフガード調査を開始
articles.summary: 2026年3月27日、欧州連合はWTOのセーフガード委員会に対し、同日に方向性電磁鋼板の輸入に関するセーフガード調査を開始したことを通知した。

articles.title: Africa, Latin America strengthen economic and trade relations at MC14 side event
articles.description: A high-level meeting dedicated to reinforcing cooperation and trade relations between Africa and Latin America was held on the margins of the WTO's 14th Ministerial Conference (MC14) on 27 March. In a keynote address, Director-General Ngozi Okonjo-Iweala highlighted the importance of this initiative to diversify trade and continue improving South-South trade.
articles.titleJa: アフリカとラテンアメリカがMC14サイドイベントで経済貿易関係を強化
articles.summary: WTO第14回閣僚会議（MC14）の傍らで、アフリカとラテンアメリカ間の協力と貿易関係を強化するためのハイレベル会議が開催され、南南貿易の重要性が強調された。

articles.title: Plastics Dialogue coordinators issue MC14 ministerial statement, technical outcome package
articles.description: On 26 March, the opening day of the 14th Ministerial Conference (MC14), the six co-coordinators of the Dialogue on Plastics Pollution and Environmentally Sustainable Plastics Trade (DPP) — Australia, Barbados, China, Ecuador, Fiji and Morocco — presented a ministerial statement and a package of five technical documents. Together, they reflect the progress achieved by participating members since MC13 and set out a forward-looking roadmap for trade-related cooperation to address plastics pollution.
articles.titleJa: プラスチック対話調整官がMC14閣僚声明、技術成果パッケージを発表
articles.summary: プラスチック汚染と環境持続可能なプラスチック貿易に関する対話の共同調整官らが、MC14の開会日に閣僚声明と技術文書パッケージを発表し、プラスチック汚染対処への貿易関連協力のロードマップを示した。
